title: Categories
subtitle: Shape how transactions, budgets, and reports understand your money.
deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this category? This cannot be undone.
selectPrompt: Select a category to edit, or click Add Category to create one.

empty.title: No categories yet
empty.description: Create categories to organize your transactions and budgets.
empty.group: No categories in this group yet.

hero.description: Categories are shared across transactions, budgets, imports, and reports. Keep them clear, compact, and easy to scan.

modal.description: Edit the category name, type, color, and icon.

iconPicker.title: Choose an icon
iconPicker.description: Search the icon pack and pick the symbol this category should use.

toast.deleteFailed: Failed to delete category. Remove or reassign linked data first.
